description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure dressed in a long, flowing dress that reaches the ankles, with a loose, draped outer garment featuring wide sleeves. The dress appears to be made of a soft, fabric material, and the outer garment has a lighter, textured look, possibly resembling a shawl or wrap. The figure's posture is upright, with one arm raised and bent at the elbow, suggesting a gesture or wave. The head is uncovered, and the hairstyle is short and neat, with the hair closely cropped to the head. No visible accessories or carried objects are present, and the footwear is obscured by the length of the dress. The overall appearance is that of a casually dressed adult, suitable for an urban street or park environment.
description: An adult pedestrian in a long, flowing dress with a loose, wide-sleeved outer garment, standing upright with one arm raised. The figure has short hair and no visible accessories or carried items.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full dress, wide sleeves, and raised arm gesture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the draped sleeve and the side profile of the dress.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the dress and the short hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the other sleeve and the flowing hem of the dress.
attribute_clothing_type: long flowing dress with a loose, wide-sleeved outer garment
attribute_posture: standing upright with one arm raised
